---
title: Directive extension test
author: Dongyu Zhao
version: 0.1
date: '2026-06-22'
license: '[CC-BY-SA 4.0](http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/)'
...

## Directives

Text directives use one colon. The label parses inline Markdown. Attributes
use the generic directive attribute-list syntax inside braces. The parser
normalizes the list to a string-to-string JSON object for the AST/API without
projecting it onto the generated HTML wrapper.

Bare, unquoted, single-quoted, and double-quoted values all become strings.
The empty object is valid.

```````````````````````````````` example
Use :cite[Smith *et al.*]{id=smith class=paper data-kind=ref} here.
.
Document scope=1:1..1:67 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:67 children=3
    ├── Text scope=1:1..1:4 literal="Use " children=0
    ├── Directive scope=1:5..1:61 mode=embedded name="cite" attributes="{\"id\":\"smith\",\"class\":\"paper\",\"data-kind\":\"ref\"}" label=2 children=2
    │   ├── Text scope=1:11..1:16 literal="Smith " children=0
    │   └── Emphasis scope=1:17..1:24 children=1
    │       └── Text scope=1:18..1:23 literal="et al." children=0
    └── Text scope=1:62..1:67 literal=" here." children=0
````````````````````````````````

Numeric- and boolean-looking values remain strings in the normalized AST/API
JSON representation.

```````````````````````````````` example
:video{id=123 muted=true title="My Video"}
.
Document scope=1:1..1:42 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:42 children=1
    └── Directive scope=1:1..1:42 mode=embedded name="video" attributes="{\"id\":\"123\",\"muted\":\"true\",\"title\":\"My Video\"}" label=null children=0
````````````````````````````````

An explicit empty attributes object is valid and is distinct from no
attributes object in the AST/API.

```````````````````````````````` example
:empty{}
.
Document scope=1:1..1:8 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:8 children=1
    └── Directive scope=1:1..1:8 mode=embedded name="empty" attributes="{}" label=null children=0
````````````````````````````````

Attribute values are normalized to strings. Bare attributes become empty
strings, the last duplicate key wins, and quoted values may contain spaces.

```````````````````````````````` example
:data[label]{muted dup=first dup=last unicode=中文😀 title="My Video"}
.
Document scope=1:1..1:74 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:74 children=1
    └── Directive scope=1:1..1:74 mode=embedded name="data" attributes="{\"muted\":\"\",\"dup\":\"last\",\"unicode\":\"中文😀\",\"title\":\"My Video\"}" label=1 children=1
        └── Text scope=1:7..1:11 literal="label" children=0
````````````````````````````````

`id` and `class` are ordinary keys. Like every repeated key, their last value
wins while their first source position is retained.

```````````````````````````````` example
:ordinary[label]{id=first class=red class=green class=blue id=last key=value}
.
Document scope=1:1..1:77 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:77 children=1
    └── Directive scope=1:1..1:77 mode=embedded name="ordinary" attributes="{\"id\":\"last\",\"class\":\"blue\",\"key\":\"value\"}" label=1 children=1
        └── Text scope=1:11..1:15 literal="label" children=0
````````````````````````````````

Malformed and unclosed attribute lists are not consumed as directive
attributes and remain ordinary Markdown text.

```````````````````````````````` example
:invalid{=value}
:open{title="value}
.
Document scope=1:1..2:19 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..2:19 children=3
    ├── Text scope=1:1..1:16 literal=":invalid{=value}" children=0
    ├── SoftBreak scope=0:0..0:0 children=0
    └── Text scope=2:1..2:19 literal=":open{title=\"value}" children=0
````````````````````````````````

HTML-style `#id` and `.class` shortcuts are outside this extension's generic
key-value grammar and remain ordinary Markdown text.

```````````````````````````````` example
:shortcut{#identifier}
:shortcut{.class}
.
Document scope=1:1..2:17 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..2:17 children=3
    ├── Text scope=1:1..1:22 literal=":shortcut{#identifier}" children=0
    ├── SoftBreak scope=0:0..0:0 children=0
    └── Text scope=2:1..2:17 literal=":shortcut{.class}" children=0
````````````````````````````````

Text directive labels can contain links.

```````````````````````````````` example
:note[See [docs](https://example.com).]
.
Document scope=1:1..1:39 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:39 children=1
    └── Directive scope=1:1..1:39 mode=embedded name="note" attributes=null label=3 children=3
        ├── Text scope=1:7..1:10 literal="See " children=0
        ├── Link scope=1:11..1:37 destination="https://example.com" title=null children=1
        │   └── Text scope=1:12..1:15 literal="docs" children=0
        └── Text scope=1:38..1:38 literal="." children=0
````````````````````````````````

Text directive labels can contain bracketed text that is not a link.

```````````````````````````````` example
:note[See [plain] text.]
.
Document scope=1:1..1:24 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:24 children=1
    └── Directive scope=1:1..1:24 mode=embedded name="note" attributes=null label=1 children=1
        └── Text scope=1:7..1:23 literal="See [plain] text." children=0
````````````````````````````````

Text directives can appear inside link text.

```````````````````````````````` example
[Go :badge[beta]](/roadmap)
.
Document scope=1:1..1:27 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:27 children=1
    └── Link scope=1:1..1:27 destination="/roadmap" title=null children=2
        ├── Text scope=1:2..1:4 literal="Go " children=0
        └── Directive scope=1:5..1:16 mode=embedded name="badge" attributes=null label=1 children=1
            └── Text scope=1:12..1:15 literal="beta" children=0
````````````````````````````````

Text directives can appear inside table cells.

```````````````````````````````` example table
| status |
| --- |
| :badge[beta] |
.
Document scope=1:1..3:16 children=1
└── Table scope=1:1..3:16 alignments=[none] children=2
    ├── TableRow scope=1:1..1:10 isHeader=true children=1
    │   └── TableCell scope=1:2..1:9 children=1
    │       └── Text scope=1:3..1:8 literal="status" children=0
    └── TableRow scope=3:1..3:16 isHeader=false children=1
        └── TableCell scope=3:2..3:15 children=1
            └── Directive scope=3:3..3:14 mode=embedded name="badge" attributes=null label=1 children=1
                └── Text scope=3:10..3:13 literal="beta" children=0
````````````````````````````````

A text directive with only a name is not recognized when it is followed by a
colon, so gemoji-compatible text remains text.

```````````````````````````````` example
:red:
.
Document scope=1:1..1:5 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:5 children=1
    └── Text scope=1:1..1:5 literal=":red:" children=0
````````````````````````````````

An empty label disambiguates a text directive before a following colon.

```````````````````````````````` example
:red[]:
.
Document scope=1:1..1:7 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:7 children=2
    ├── Directive scope=1:1..1:6 mode=embedded name="red" attributes=null label=0 children=0
    └── Text scope=1:7..1:7 literal=":" children=0
````````````````````````````````

Directive names can start with punctuation characters allowed by the syntax,
but they cannot end with a hyphen or underscore.

```````````````````````````````` example
:a-[]
:-a[]
:_a[]
.
Document scope=1:1..3:5 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..3:5 children=5
    ├── Text scope=1:1..1:5 literal=":a-[]" children=0
    ├── SoftBreak scope=0:0..0:0 children=0
    ├── Directive scope=2:1..2:5 mode=embedded name="-a" attributes=null label=0 children=0
    ├── SoftBreak scope=0:0..0:0 children=0
    └── Directive scope=3:1..3:5 mode=embedded name="_a" attributes=null label=0 children=0
````````````````````````````````

Leaf directives use two colons on their own line. Repeated metadata keys use
their last value and are not projected onto HTML.

```````````````````````````````` example
::youtube[Video of a *cat*]{vid=01ab2cd3efg class=embed class=featured}
.
Document scope=1:1..1:71 children=1
└── DirectiveBlock scope=1:1..1:71 mode=standalone name="youtube" attributes="{\"vid\":\"01ab2cd3efg\",\"class\":\"featured\"}" label=2 children=2
    ├── Text scope=1:11..1:21 literal="Video of a " children=0
    └── Emphasis scope=1:22..1:26 children=1
        └── Text scope=1:23..1:25 literal="cat" children=0
````````````````````````````````

Container directives use three or more colons on their own line. A closing
fence must have at least the opening fence length.

```````````````````````````````` example
::::spoiler{id=outer class=red class=green class=blue}
He dies.

:::spoiler
She is born.
:::
::::
.
Document scope=1:1..7:4 children=1
└── DirectiveBlock scope=1:1..7:4 mode=standalone name="spoiler" attributes="{\"id\":\"outer\",\"class\":\"blue\"}" label=null children=2
    ├── Paragraph scope=2:1..2:8 children=1
    │   └── Text scope=2:1..2:8 literal="He dies." children=0
    └── DirectiveBlock scope=4:1..7:4 mode=standalone name="spoiler" attributes=null label=null children=1
        └── Paragraph scope=5:1..7:4 children=1
            └── Text scope=5:1..5:12 literal="She is born." children=0
````````````````````````````````

If no closing fence is found, the container runs to the end of its parent.

```````````````````````````````` example
::::spoiler
These three are not enough to close
:::
So this line is also part of the container.
.
Document scope=1:1..4:43 children=1
└── DirectiveBlock scope=1:1..4:43 mode=standalone name="spoiler" attributes=null label=null children=1
    └── Paragraph scope=2:1..4:43 children=5
        ├── Text scope=2:1..2:35 literal="These three are not enough to close" children=0
        ├── SoftBreak scope=0:0..0:0 children=0
        ├── Text scope=3:1..3:3 literal=":::" children=0
        ├── SoftBreak scope=0:0..0:0 children=0
        └── Text scope=4:1..4:43 literal="So this line is also part of the container." children=0
````````````````````````````````

An indented colon run inside a container is content, not a closing fence.

```````````````````````````````` example
:::spoiler
    :::
:::
.
Document scope=1:1..3:3 children=1
└── DirectiveBlock scope=1:1..3:3 mode=standalone name="spoiler" attributes=null label=null children=1
    └── CodeBlock scope=2:5..2:7 mode=standalone info=null language=null literal=":::\n" fenced=false closed=true children=0
````````````````````````````````
